entry.title: Re: Upgrading to Latest Goal Management – Cycle Planning & Preparedness – Best Practice Approach
entry.content:
Hello,

In our performance process, the Get Feedback functionality is used to give the Get Feedback provider the same editing options in the form as the manager.

We have switched to Latest Goal management in production. The Get Feedback giver is authorized to the Target and the Development template per RBP. The RBP have not been changed.

In Legacy Goal Management, both performance and development goals could be entered via Get Feedback using the form.
This is no longer possible after the changeover to Latest Goal Management.

As the development plan is visible in our company, it is not possible to authorize all employees to all goal/development plans.

This means that the Get Feedback function for creating and editing goals via the form is no longer available.

We urgently need to restore this functionality.

Thank you for your feedback.

Thanks

Conny

entry.title: Re: What is SAP Approuter and its importance ?
entry.content: The standalone approuter can also be deployed on Kyma.

entry.title: Re: Simplest method to create a customizing table with radio buttons/checkboxes
entry.content:
That is a very nice guide to custom config tables. A couple of comments from my side:

Enhancement category

You have suggested to use the fist one "Can Be Enhanced (Deep)"

In my opinion "Cannot Be Enhanced" should be used for custom config tables. The reason is that if you need to add more fields to a table, you will just add them directly to the table definition and won't create an enhancement structure. There is really no point in using enhancement structure for custom tables.

Buffering

You have missed the crucial setting of Table Buffering of Database Tables, e.g. of T001W buffering settings:

The rule of thumb is that buffering should be activated for config tables, either generic area of fully buffered.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content: you think like me

entry.title: Issues with Master Data Transfer from ERP HANA Cloud to DM
entry.content:
Dear Members,

 

I hope you are doing well. I am writing to seek your assistance regarding some issues I've encountered while transferring master data from ERP HANA Cloud to Digital Manufacturing (DM).

FYI, I am using DM TDD, HANA Cloud Demo.

 

Issue 1: Missing BOM Information in Routing

According to the documentation, transferring the master routing should update the Bill of Materials (BOM) in DM as well. However, in DM, the BOM information is missing from the routing. I used the Replicate by Object Selection app in ERP HANA Cloud, selecting "Production Bill of Operations" as 'Business Object Type' to transfer the routing to DM. Despite BOM and Production Version being already created in HANA Cloud, the BOM information is not reflected in the routing within DM.

 

 

Issue 2: Excessive Creation of BOM and Routing

Another issue has surfaced concerning the creation of Production Orders. After generating and releasing a Production Order, it correctly reaches DM. Although the BOM does not download to DM, the routing does. However, for each order sent to DM, BOM and routing seem to be created again by accumulation within DM, leading to an excessive number of BOMs and routings.

 

Could you please provide guidance or suggest any solutions to address these issues?

Thank you in advance for your support.

 

Best regards,

Wonpyo

 

SAP HANA Cloud SAP Digital Manufacturing

entry.title: Re: RPA SMTP Mail Destination Configuration with OAuth2Password for Microsoft 365?
entry.content: If the idea is helpful, please develop the project.

entry.title: Re: Teams VLS for users without company email
entry.content:
Hi @EricAbrams 

To be honest, the solution you are looking for ist not "best practice". 😉 

The most important point for a successfull VLS integration with MS Teams is, that the user records of the instructors really exist in Microsoft Azure. If there's no active MS Azure User of the instructor, there will be a validation error if you try to schedule a VLS time slot for a class. If you have external instructors they also need a Microsoft licence AND a MS Azure User of your organization - otherwise you will also get a validation error.

Once you managed to send out a VLS meeting request to at least one user, you can copy the Teams session link from the instructor's or student's Teams calendar and provide it (offline) to other persons. Everyone with the link will be able to join the VLS session, but as I mentioned above, it's not "best practice". 😉

Good luck! KR Jonas

entry.title: Re: Aggregation of rate elements with rate subelements Su...
entry.content:
Hi Carsen,

thank you very much again for your explanation, I'm glad that at least I was going in the correct direction in terms of configuration.
Concerning the aggregation, I guess I was confused by the explanatory example proposed in the SAP Help (https://help.sap.com/docs/PRICE_CALCULATION/53987d38467243e28cbeb8514d015666/8dace9fbf88541549e82e2484fa7bd8c.html) where the aggregation is applied to the scenario "You want to price separately different sorts of apples, but the price per kilogram depends on the total quantity of apples in the priceable document."
Thanks again and have a nice day!

Kr,
Elena

entry.title: S4/Hana Group Reporting: Correct data on Soctypes for Reclassifications
entry.content:
Hi All. Within Group Reporting we have changed some reclassification rules during the year (e.g. changed Plug Accounts from long term to short term elimination). 

Problem is that in the periods that are already closed, the eliminations have obviously run against the old rules. We don't want to reopen those periods so we want to book a correction later in the year. What is the best practice to do so, ideally without posting the correction on a different document type? Should we temporaraly make the document type a manual correction document type to book the manual correction?

 

Kind regards,

entry.content: Can you help me?

entry.title: setFilename dynamically in TPM for AS2 configuration
entry.content:
Hi All, 

The scenario is IDOC to AS2 using TPM, and I have the requirement to add filename dynamically in the receiver AS2 channel. For example, the format for adding the filename is message.messageId

Is there any way to add AS2 filename dynamically in TPM configuration? 

Thanks 

Radhika

The additional context parameters come as part of SAP note 3344850 - MDQ Performance: Enhancement of BRFplus Context for Validation Rules.

The note is downported till S/4 HANA 2021.

Regards

Anirban

entry.title: Re: Extract peer SSL certificate automatically to resolve SSSLERR_PEER_CERT_UNTRUSTED
entry.content:
ICM level 3 trace logs the server SSL certificate. 
Openssl can also extract SSL certificate from the target with the -showcerts option.

I am a Basis admin . I find having the root certificate in the ABAP trust store more manageable than having the certificate chain if everyone agrees to it. It lasts longer as well in most cases well over 10 years
Specially with the BTP end points, SAP keeps changing the certificates and its recommended to have the root certificate in trust store

can you please tell me where can i check who changed it.

kind regards,

Vijender

entry.content: I have admired rap music for a long time.

entry.title: Re: MRS, Work Manager & Asset Manager
entry.content:
Hi Mohammed, hope you are not confusing the solutions with each other too much, because:

  • MRS (Multiresource Scheduling) is a planning & scheduling solution. It requires installation as an ABAP addon on ERP (both ECC and S4 versions are available, and basically work the same, with just one minor difference regarding the material master, documented here: https://me.sap.com/notes/0002493452 ). BUT: the solution is in maintenance mode and no longer a strategic solution. The current mainstream maintenance end is planned for 31.12.2027 with an option for extended maintenance to 31.12.2030 on ECC.
    Successor solutions of MRS are dependent on the scenario you are trying to address:
    • for (inhouse) asset-centric scenarios, you might want to check SAP S/4HANA Asset Management for resource scheduling (RSH): https://www.sap.com/rsh
    • for service-centric or field-related scenarios or dispatching on technician level, you might want to check SAP Field Service Management (FSM): https://www.sap.com/fsm 
    • for project-staffing scenarios, you might want to check SAP Cloud for projects resource management: https://www.sap.com/products/scm/project-resource-management.html 
  • Work Manager is the predecessor of Asset Manager or Service and Asset Manager respectively, which is a solution for mobile maintenance execution. See the product overview page here: https://www.sap.com/products/scm/asset-manager.html

Hope this helps!
Best regards,

Markus

entry.title: Can customers expand default memory size?
entry.content:
Hello ILM experts,

As described in the help portal page for ILM Advisor app, the default licensed memory size is 100 GB.
Is this applicable for any customers? If so, can a customer request to expand the memory size more than 100 GB? I guess the customer needs to create a case from SAP for me. What is the component for the case?

Additionally, what is the maximum size for the licensed memory? I found a description regarding the maximum memory size chart by FUEs in the "GROW with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Service Use Descriptions".

Is this also applicable for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?

Like would I be able to use the service requests in revisions then create build orders, PM confirmation etc.

entry.title: Re: Cancel Goods Receipt PO query report into SAP Busines...
entry.content:
This query shows goods receipts that were cancelled in the selected period:

SELECT DISTINCT T2.DocEntry,  T2.[DocDate], T2.CardCode, T2.CardName, T0.DocDate as "Cancelled on" 
FROM OPDN T0 
INNER JOIN PDN1 t1 ON t0.Docentry = T1.DocEntry 
INNER JOIN OPDN T2 ON T1.BaseEntry = T2.DocEntry AND T1.BaseType = 20
WHERE T0.[CANCELED] ='C'
AND T0.DocDate > = '[%0]' AND T0.DocDate <= '[%1]'

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP)的架构理解
entry.content: 感谢Alex的精彩分享。

entry.title: Re: SAP Omnichannel Sales Transfer and Audit a new sales transaction validation industry cloud solut
entry.content:
Hi,

SAP Omnichannel Sales Transfer and Audit (OSTA) can only be used with the Retail Datamodel in the S/4 system. SAP Landscapes without the industry solution IS for Retail will not be able to connect to OSTA for the data transfer (material and billing documents) and also not for the master data synchronisation.

entry.title: Re: Entering SAP Signavio certification

I am currently preparing for the SAP Signavio Process Management Consultant Certification.  "Managing Business Processes" is the perfect Learning Journey to dive deeper into the world of Process Management and to learn the basics about the SAP Signavio Products Process Manager, Collaboration Hub, Journey Modeler and Process Governance. Afterwards you are greatly prepared to start using the products by yourself.

Best, Cäcilia

entry.title: Summary Row for a SQL HANA Query Error
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am trying to update an SQL HANA query to include the summary row for a couple of columns.  I am using the UNION ALL method to get the summary, individually the two queries are working fine, but when executed together I get an below error.

Below query::

SELECT T2."Indicator",T0."DocNum",T0."TaxDate" "Doc Date",DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."TaxDate",CURRENT_DATE) "No. Of Days",T0."CardName", T0."NumAtCard",
cast(T3."InsTotal" as integer) AS "Total Amount",cast(T3."InsTotal"-T3."PaidToDate" as integer) AS "Open Amount", T1."SlpName" 
FROM ORDR T0 
INNER JOIN RDR6 T3 ON T0."DocEntry"=T3."DocEntry" 
INNER JOIN OSLP T1 ON T0."SlpCode" = T1."SlpCode" 
INNER JOIN OPID T2 ON T0."PIndicator" = T2."Indicator" 
WHERE DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."TaxDate",CURRENT_DATE)>365 and T0."CANCELED"='N' and T0."DocStatus"='O' 
UNION ALL
SELECT '','','','','','Total',
sum(T3."InsTotal"),sum(T3."InsTotal"-T3."PaidToDate"),''
FROM ORDR T0 
INNER JOIN RDR6 T3 ON T0."DocEntry"=T3."DocEntry" 
INNER JOIN OSLP T1 ON T0."SlpCode" = T1."SlpCode" 
INNER JOIN OPID T2 ON T0."PIndicator" = T2."Indicator" 
WHERE DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."TaxDate",CURRENT_DATE)>365 and T0."CANCELED"='N' and T0."DocStatus"='O'

on executing i am getting the below error :

SAP DBTech JDBC: [339]: invalid number: Failed to parse constant

entry.title: Questions about Individual Usage Records
entry.content:
Hi,

for a usage-based use case I have the following questions:

  • what is the optimal batch size of individual usage records that SAP Subscription Billing can accept - I know max. is 500 records, but maybe max is not the best value.
  • What is the number of parallel batches that it can handle
  • What is the processing time of each batch in SAP Subscription Billing, so I can configure reasonable response waiting timeout and to identify the processing interval, e.g. how frequently to send batches.

    Thanks

entry.title: What is the use of Retention Period for Scores
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Could you please explain what is the use of Retention Period for Scores

what will happen if i select

Scores Saved = Monthly

Retention Period for Scores = 2 days

Regards,

Amshu

entry.title: Re: Do Virtual Tables support ST_POINT or ST_GEOMETRY
entry.content: oh, I see you are using a HANA Express (=HANA on-prem) as a remote source. Then you are right - spatial datatypes are not supported and you can workaround as you suggested via converting it to TEXT/WKT and back.

entry.title: Re: GRC Firefighter Idle Session Timeout
entry.content: Dear Ken, do you find any solution for this issue ?

entry.title: Re: Two different DM Custom View Plugins are mistakenly c...
entry.content:
Hi Kevin, thanks for your quick reply.

Of course we use your Yoeman tool which does a great job 👍
To help future beginners I would recommend documenting the attribute somewhere to clarify what it is for. In my research I have not found anything on this topic in the official documentation. In the Developer's Guide it is used a few times in code snippets but is always “false” and is never explained further. Even though the attribute name sounds descriptive, a clarification would always help me.

You have already correctly identified the problem with the second point. The problem is that the same text is displayed in the POD Designer, but these are two completely different plugins (with different i18n/builder.properties), which should have nothing to do with each other. DM is therefore incorrectly merging the Plugins here. Our test case above was that we created two plugins with the Yoeman generator. One plugin is called “peggingGraph” and one “peggingGraphZwo”. Two plugins with different names, namespaces, builder.properties, ID's etc. Nevertheless, only one text is displayed in the POD Designer (sometimes the text from the builder.properties of the first plugin is displayed, sometimes from the second). As a result, only one plugin can be added at a time in the Designer.
=> So two different plugins that are incorrectly combined

thanks, Max

entry.title: Re: Alternative to I_InventoryPriceByKeyDate
entry.content: Hi Owen, this article did not really provide an if there is an alternative to the CDS View that I need. Best, Joelle

entry.title: Re: What is the use of Retention Period for Scores
entry.content:
Hello @rajanikanth111, Amshu,

Long time! Hope all well at your end.

If you select Scores Saved = Monthly and Retention Period for Scores = 2 days, the system will save scores monthly but will only keep these scores for 2 days. ie.e the saved scores will be deleted soon after they are generated and stored, potentially making them unavailable for future analysis or reporting.

I hope this help answering your query and closing thread.
Thanks and Regards,
Kunal Bansal
SAP CX Solution Architect
------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.title: RFC Timeout Failure for PO Rejection from FIORI app - workflow
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

We are using our own Workflow tasks for PO approval and rejection .

It was working fine before upgrade but after we moved from 1909 to 2023 , The Approval option is working fine but the Rejection option is getting the RFC Timeout error although the RFC is working fine.

/IWFND/ERROR_LOG shows 'RFC call was not successful because of system failure 'Time limit exceeded''.

Did Anyone face issue like this before , any help will be appreciated .

Thank You !

entry.title: Build the Skills to Bring out Your Best: SAP TechEd Virtual – Learning Zone Is Now Live!
entry.content:
Calling all tech enthusiasts! With SAP TechEd Virtual being just around the corner, it’s time to get ahead of the game and build the skills to bring out your best. Join a community of experts, acquire in-demand skills, and prepare for a globally recognized certification with self-paced learning in the SAP TechEd Virtual – Learning zone – even before the main event starts on October 8!

Learning tools and opportunities for you:

  • Get started with 40 interactive value journeys and showcases to discover the value of SAP solutions.
  • Access 45 free, self-paced learning journeys curated to each of the content tracks of SAP TechEd Virtual to upskill in the latest SAP solutions. 
  • Subscribe to premium, guided learning resources with SAP Learning Hub to maximize your skills and earn a globally recognized certification, with an exclusive 25% discount.
  • Access demos and 25 basic trials to explore the power of SAP solutions and 50 use cases to get hands-on experience.
  • Connect with experts, expand your network, and collaborate with peers in dedicated learning groups and bridge the time until October 8 with SAP Community events.

Explore learning offerings for each SAP TechEd track:

  • Digital Transformation with Cloud ERP 
  • SAP Business Technology Platform
  • Artificial Intelligence
  • Application Development and Automation
  • Data and Analytics
  • Integration

Register for SAP TechEd Virtual to benefit from a 25% discount on SAP Learning Hub:

 As a registered SAP TechEd Virtual attendee, you can benefit from an exclusive 25% discount on your SAP Learning Hub subscription! Once you have subscribed to our guided premium learning offering, you can get access to learning content and certification exam attempts, expert guidance in digital live sessions and on-demand hands-on practice systems too.

We know that learning is vital – now more than ever. Jump to the SAP TechEd Virtual – Learning zone today to get a head start into SAP TechEd in 2024.

See you all at SAP TechEd Virtual – Learning zone, and beyond!

entry.title: How to Block a Ship-to Location in SAP ByDesign
entry.content:
How to Block a Ship-to Location in SAP ByDesign

Dear SAP Support,

Could you please guide me on how to block a Ship-to Location?

With the 2408 update in ByDesign, a change was introduced titled "Create Stock Transfer Orders for Materials with Blocked Ship-To Locations." I would like to test this update on my system, but I am not sure how to set a Location to Blocked status.

Could you please provide a step-by-step guide on how to do this, including the specific Workcenter and View that should be used?

Thank you for your assistance.

 

https://help.sap.com/whats-new/2e5f185568e744db82065313bbbcc6ae?locale=en-US

entry.content: Kindly send the screenshot of the CDS view..

entry.title: Re: Creating Freight unit stages for TM public cloud
SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Ed.: Flexible Workflow - Emails are not being sent
entry.content:
Hi, 

I want emails to be sent when a project billing request is approved or rejected to the person who triggered the workflow. 

What I already did: 

  • Created to Email Templates form the predefined Template "SWF_WORKFLOW_COMPLETE_NOTIFY" with the name "YY1_01800259_COMPLETE_NEGATIVE" and "YY1_01800259_COMPLETE_POSITIVE". 
  • I have worked through this documentary (defining allowed email sender/receiver domains etc.): https://support.sap.com/content/dam/SAAP/Sol_Pack/S4C/Library/Setup/1LQ_Set-Up_EN_XX.pdf

If I create an Email Template with the Name YY1_01800259_CRT_ALL an Email is trigged as you can see in this Screenshot: 

But nothing happens with the templates YY1_01800259_COMPLETE_POSITIVE and YY1_01800259_COMPLETE_NEGATIVE. 

Can someone please help me with this? 

Thanks in advance! 

 

Theresa

entry.title: Re: SAC Content Transport (Migration) Using CTMS
entry.content:
Hi @DevM98 ,

According to my understanding, the transport of SAP Analytics Cloud Network Package content is not supported for SAP Cloud Transport Management instances running on SAP Cloud ALM tenants. This has been one reason to come up with the guidance to use standalone instances of SAP Cloud Transport Management service together with SAP Cloud ALM, as outlined here: New Integration of SAP Cloud Transport Management ... - SAP Community

If you want to move an existing setup to this new recommendation, here is also a blog post around this topic: How to migrate an SAP Cloud Transport Management i... - SAP Community

Best regards,
Boris

entry.title: Re: Creating Freight unit stages for TM public cloud
entry.content: Hi, Does SAP public cloud support the external planning of freight bookings, or is this only supported for freight orders? Meaning is it possible to have a trasnportation plan (multiple stages) when working with an external planning tool in public cloud

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content: Kindly post the screenshot of the CDS view and data preview of the CDS view that you have created. The above screenshot is from another participant.

entry.title: Re: error w while trying to create a blog
entry.content: @SJ2024 - welcome to SAP Community! I see you are a newcomer - just to let you know that you must take the tutorial, and complete each step, plus you cannot write a blog post immediately once you join, as there is a wait time.

entry.title: Re: Manage outgoing checks app search function for Payee/Supplier does not work properly
entry.content: F1578 Manage outgoing checks, GS app

entry.title: Re: How can I cancel a A/R Down Payment Invoice ?
entry.content:
Hi Felipe,
Its in Portuguese localization.
And for documents not payd yet.
Rgards,
Paulo

entry.title: Re: How to include a URL to access the SAP WF approval screen in the notification e-mail
entry.content: Hi Thank you. I guess in the screenshot you opened the workflow definition in PFWS. Deep link over CDS view I_WorkflowTaskURL provides WorkflowTaskURL for a workflow task instance (WorkflowTaskInternalID) = workitem id for the User Decision Task.

entry.title: consume an service from a cap appliaction to a another cap application
entry.content:
I have two applications deployed in CF/Kyma within different subaccounts under the same global account. Application 1 contains a product app, 
and Application 2 contains an order app and is using the portal service. I want to integrate these such that, when I open the portal in Application 2, the product app tile from Application 1 is visible.
 
How can I achieve this? Could you provide any blogs or resources related to this process?

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
Implementation will not be called
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have created a BADI with multiple use is checked in SE18. However, in SE19, the multiple use is unclick and the implementation will not be called. What steps should I do in order to make this BADI is called? Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Schedules for Maintenance Deliveries is moving to SAP for Me
entry.content:
The calendar it's a nightmare... So to find the release date for a product, I need to filter by text and moving month by month, or going to the "Maintenance Deliveries" tab which only displays a year and in small boxes by quarter, I can't search/filter by a product.

Now I'm trying to search the delivery date for S/4HANA 2025, and it's impossible. I search for every month in 2025.

Why every time SAP change something is worse?

The community page, SAP for Me, Universal ID, Schedules for Maintenance Deliveries

Please, think in the functionality when you build something, not just in "Oh, this could be pretty"

entry.title: Re: Printing an invoice based on existing correspondence type for journal entries with one customer
entry.content:
@StefanieSchulke 

Hello Stefanie,

Thank you for your feedback. Meanwhile, S/4HANA Cloud, public edition includes a new correspondence type SAP21 (FI Customer Invoice) which can be used instead of SAP09 for printing customer invoices. The new correspondence type SAP21 was specifically designed for printing customer invoices. Please find more information here: Printing of Customer Invoices in Financial Accounting (FI).

Unfortunately, neither of the two correspondence types SAP09 and SAP21 support a mass-print activity. So, it has to be printed per document. In the app Create Correspondence you can use the Copy function to reduce the steps when printing more than one invoice.

Additionally, you can also raise a feature request for printing customer invoices via a scheduled application job. Please follow the steps described in this article: 

2963059 - How to Submit Feature Requests for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

 

Best regards
Steffen

entry.title: Re: Automatic EDI Vendor Invoice creation in MM (LIV) through IDOC from Intercompany Billing
entry.content: What Andreas said was right. In the inbound parameter for partner LI(vendor), the Message Code should be MM, not FI instead. And, the Process code should be INVL, not INVF instead. Best Regards, Linux Gao

entry.title: Re: PDF Sending to REST API with JavaScript in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hi @myenilmez ,
I am getting CORS error while calling the API.Were you not getting it , if yes , how are you handling it.
Thanks,
Keerthana

entry.title: how can to adding the ads in appgyver
entry.content: How do I add ads inside the app on the appgyver platform?

entry.title: Re: Error BDEF "is not a lock entity" during generation o...
entry.content: If you want to build a draft enabled RAP BO, you need to add the total etag field. Otherwise, concurrency control is not possible.

entry.title: Re: Show Changeset error response from SAP RAP in UI
entry.content: did you find the answer for this?
